name: Summer Dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove the seeds from the cucumbers.
2. Combine all ingredients in a bowl and mix well.
3. Refrigerate for at least 2 hours before serving.
Values per Serving: CHO 3 gm., PRO 1 gm., FAT 0, Cal 17, Sodium 84 mg. with salt.
Food Exchange per Serving: Up to 3 TBSP may be considered "free."
